sentences.text: To noon. Thank you for calling Metro plex management located at seven. Oh five, Royal Oaks court and moms junction new Jersey. If you know your party's extension please dial it at any time for the maintenance department dial one hundred for resident Services dial one. Oh four for rent payments and the accounts receivable department dial one zero six and for the accounts payable department dial one zero five. Please hold while I transfer your call. Please hold.
